interact.desc: interact 参数，当前仅实现 action=open

action.code: function(){ return { url: String(location.href||''), title: String(document.title||''), ts: Date.now() }; }
function(){ return { by: 'css: body', sigKey: null, fromCache: false }; }
function(v){ return { by: String((v&&v.by)||''), sigKey: null, fromCache: false, byAuto: true, hint: String((v&&v.hint)||'') }; }
function(){ return { url: String(location.href||''), title: String(document.title||''), ts: Date.now() }; }

controlCheck.desc: 控件是否位于目标容器内
